entries.name: MIT CSAIL
entries.fullName: MIT Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence Laboratory
entries.description: MIT's largest interdepartmental research lab — one of the original homes of AI research, now a hub for LLM, robotics, and systems work.

entries.name: MIT Sloan AI
entries.fullName: MIT Sloan School of Management — AI initiatives
entries.description: Business-of-AI research and education at MIT Sloan, with a focus on enterprise AI adoption and management.

entries.name: The Engine
entries.description: Tough-tech accelerator spun out of MIT — backs startups in AI, biotech, advanced materials, and climate.

entries.name: Harvard SEAS
entries.fullName: Harvard John A. Paulson School of Engineering and Applied Sciences
entries.description: Harvard's engineering school with strong programs in applied ML, systems, and computational science.

entries.name: Harvard Innovation Labs
entries.description: Harvard's student + alumni venture incubator. Free programming for early-stage Harvard-affiliated founders.

entries.name: Northeastern Khoury
entries.fullName: Khoury College of Computer Sciences, Northeastern University
entries.description: Northeastern's computing college — strong in AI, systems, cybersecurity, and the co-op model that ties students to local industry.

entries.name: Roux Institute
entries.fullName: The Roux Institute at Northeastern University
entries.description: Northeastern's graduate campus focused on AI, life sciences, and digital engineering in partnership with industry.

entries.name: BU Hariri Institute
entries.fullName: Rafik B. Hariri Institute for Computing, Boston University
entries.description: BU's interdisciplinary computing institute — funds and connects AI, data science, and computational research across campus.

entries.name: BU Spark!
entries.description: BU's technology incubator and experiential learning lab — students build real AI/data products for civic and nonprofit partners.

entries.name: Tufts Engineering
entries.description: Tufts' engineering school with strong robotics, human-robot interaction, and applied ML programs.

entries.name: UMass Amherst
entries.fullName: University of Massachusetts Amherst — College of Information and Computer Sciences
entries.description: UMass's flagship CS program — a top-ranked public school for AI and NLP research.

entries.name: UMass Boston
entries.fullName: University of Massachusetts Boston — Department of Computer Science
entries.description: UMass Boston's CS department — urban public university with AI/ML and data science programs.

entries.name: WPI
entries.description: Project-based STEM university with strong robotics, AI, and interactive-media programs.

entries.name: Bentley University
entries.description: Business-tech university in the Boston suburbs — programs in data analytics, information systems, and AI for business.

entries.name: Babson College
entries.description: Entrepreneurship-focused business school — top-ranked for startup founder development.

entries.name: Olin College
entries.description: Small project-based engineering college — students build and ship real engineering projects from day one.

entries.name: MAIC
entries.description: Cross-industry coalition bringing together Massachusetts-based companies, academia, and government to shape AI policy and practice.

entries.name: MassRobotics
entries.description: Independent nonprofit hub for robotics startups — shared lab space, programs, and industry partnerships.

entries.name: MassChallenge
entries.description: Equity-free global accelerator, headquartered in Boston. Year-long program for early-stage startups across industries.

entries.name: TechStars Boston
entries.description: Mentor-driven 13-week accelerator program with Boston-region focus.

entries.name: Greentown Labs
entries.description: North America's largest climatetech startup incubator — lab and office space for energy, mobility, and materials startups.

entries.name: LearnLaunch
entries.description: Edtech-focused accelerator and community — programs for startups building at the intersection of learning and technology.

entries.name: MassTLC
entries.description: Member-led industry association for Massachusetts technology companies — programs, advocacy, and executive peer groups.

entries.name: Mass Tech Collaborative
entries.description: State public agency that invests in tech-driven economic growth across Massachusetts — grants, programs, and ecosystem work.

entries.name: MITRE
entries.description: Federally funded R&D center operating multiple FFRDCs for the U.S. government — significant AI, cybersecurity, and systems research footprint.

entries.name: Underscore VC
entries.description: Boston-based seed-stage venture firm known for its operator-investor Core Community model.

entries.name: Pillar VC
entries.description: Seed and pre-seed firm investing in Boston-area founders across enterprise software, biotech, and AI.

entries.name: General Catalyst
entries.description: Multi-stage VC firm with deep Boston roots — invests across AI, healthcare, and enterprise software.

entries.name: Flagship Pioneering
entries.description: Venture firm and platform that originates, founds, and scales companies at the frontier of life sciences and AI.
